title: Lübeck Air
summary: Lubeck Air was a small German virtual regional airline which was based at Lübeck Airport. The company was founded in 2016 for business and charter flights. It commenced scheduled operations in 2020 and ceased operations in 2023.
text:
Lubeck Air was a small German virtual regional airline which was based at Lübeck Airport. The company was founded in 2016 for business and charter flights. It commenced scheduled operations in 2020 and ceased operations in 2023.

Fleet
As a virtual airline, Lübeck Air has never operated aircraft itself; instead it paid other airlines to operate aircraft on its behalf:
